name: Freaky Nether (Extreme version)
description:
WARNING: This is the original, really fucked up version of the first bot with lots of weird/offensive kinks

When the world is hell, how bad can the underworld be? Fleeing from the anarchy of the overworld, you lock yourself in the nether, trying to survive alone on this strange yet beautiful hellscape

⊱∘─────────∘⊰⋅⋆⋅⊱∘─────────∘⊰

Yes, this is heavily fetishized Minecraft porn... Still, I had lots of fun with this one.

Fetishes might include:

Rape, transformation, slavery, mind control, watersports, vore, parasitism, insects (they're endermites, but well...), nipple penetration, smegma, STDs, amputee, identity death, and even snuff if you're a total noob. If you find these fetishes offensive, you can find a more vanilla version of this bot on my profile.

This bot WILL actively try to ruin or harm your characters.

( I died 13 times myself)

Notes:

You can choose any items as the starter gear, but as a runaway, it makes more sense starting with random junk (sticks, strings, a piece of bread, etc) and a half-used pickaxe. Maybe an enderpearl as a one use clutch.

The nether star can be used as a talisman that grants the same effects of a beacon, for convenience sake

Some itens have additional properties and effects, for example:

  • Bone meal have anti-bacterial effects and can be used to halt the wither spread on flesh, or to disinfect food

  • Soul soil can be used for planting crops, and works better than regular dirt!

  • Shroomlight stores murky, but drinkable water

  • I'm still planning on these additional effects for existing items/blocks, so please leave suggestions below

  • Lastly, this works MUCH better on Deepseek. LLM probably won't work well with so many tokens
creator: Chok0o
